projects.name: dig
projects.description: DIG is a numerical invariant generation tool. It infers program invariants or properties over (i) program execution traces or (ii) program source code.  DIG supports many forms of numerical invariants, including nonlinear equalities, octagonal and  interval properties, min/max-plus relations, and congruence relations.
